zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期横盘偏弱整理
zh.content:
目前比特币价格徘徊在63129.3美元附近，较24小时内高点63490略有回落，显示短期市场多头动力有限。整体走势呈现横盘整理特征，短期内多空力量处于平衡，价格可能在支撑与阻力之间震荡。

从技术指标来看，MACD为-585.73322，显示空方略占优势，但因信号线数据缺失，趋势确认仍需谨慎。20日SMA在63485.37附近，价格位于均线下方略有压制，暗示短期上行阻力存在。若RSI数据可用，可进一步判断超买或超卖状态以辅助决策。

支撑位主要集中在63100至63000美元区间，若跌破该区域，可能引发进一步回调压力。阻力位则在63500至63600美元附近，多头若能有效突破该区间，将有望延续反弹行情。交易者应关注关键价位的突破与回踩情况。

综合来看，短期内建议采取谨慎操作，偏向观望或短线高抛低吸策略。保持严格止损控制，避免追涨杀跌，同时关注成交量变化和关键均线支撑，灵活调整仓位以应对价格波动带来的风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is showing a mildly bearish short-term structure, trading at 63,129.3 and sitting near the session low of 63,127.68. The 24-hour decline of 0.50% is modest, but the inability to sustain movement toward the daily high of 63,490 suggests sellers remain active on rallies. Price is also trading below the 20-period simple moving average at 63,485.37, indicating that short-term momentum has weakened and that the market is currently favoring downside pressure.

The moving average relationship reinforces a cautious outlook. Remaining below the SMA(20) often signals that buyers have lost immediate control of the trend. Meanwhile, the MACD value of -585.73 points to persistent negative momentum, even though the signal line is unavailable for confirmation. This deeply negative MACD reading suggests bearish forces are still influential, and traders should watch for evidence of stabilization before anticipating a sustained recovery.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 63,100–63,130, a zone currently being tested. A decisive break below this area could expose additional downside toward 62,500 and potentially 62,000. On the upside, resistance is evident near the SMA(20) around 63,485, followed by the recent intraday high at 63,490. A successful move above these levels would improve short-term sentiment and could attract renewed buying interest.

For traders, patience may be appropriate until clearer directional signals emerge. Aggressive bearish participants may consider short opportunities on failed rallies toward the 63,450–63,500 resistance area, while maintaining disciplined risk controls. More conservative traders may prefer waiting for either a confirmed break below support or a recovery above the moving average before entering positions. Given the current momentum profile, capital preservation and careful position sizing remain particularly important.
